-- 4 of 6 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you how to properly remarket
your Facebook Ads creative to your audience in a way
that doesn’t exhaust them.
The bottom of the funnel is where you make the most
of your money. So this is important because the nature
of remarketing involves getting customers with existing
interest to buy.
Audiences That We Will Target
• 	Page Visitors
• 	Add to Carts
• 	Initiate Checkout
LESSON:
REMARKETING (BOTTOM
FUNNEL)
MODULE:
SCALING WITH
FACEBOOK ADS
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	Go ahead and remarket your Facebook Ads to
your existing audience.
“The more profitable you are at the bottom of the funnel,
the more money you can spend at the top.”
TOOLS & RESOURCES
• 	Flexify, Facebook Product Feed
